| Conflict Check | <Where conflicts may occur> |

## Acceptance Criteria

Document can be accepted if:

- [ ] It answers all key questions.
- [ ] It does not duplicate another document's responsibility.
- [ ] It clearly separates MVP and Future Scope.
- [ ] It contains testable requirements.
- [ ] It includes error/edge cases where applicable.
- [ ] It states direct document relationships.
- [ ] It can be implemented without oral clarification.

## Testability Notes

Explain which tests, checks or review procedures can verify the requirements.

## Open Questions

- ...

## Freeze Criteria

Document can be frozen if:

- [ ] All mandatory sections are complete.
- [ ] All open blocking questions are resolved.
- [ ] Audit passed.
- [ ] Product Owner approved.
- [ ] Change rules are clear.

## Change Rules

After FROZEN status, changes require a Change Request.
